providers.name: Lena
providers.tagline: Quiet evenings, good conversation, and a glass of wine.
providers.about: I'll join you for dinner, a gallery opening, or a weekend away. I especially enjoy long conversations about architecture and old films. Discretion goes without saying for me, and so does punctuality.

providers.name: Sofia
providers.tagline: Happiest by the water, with good coffee.
providers.about: Hamburg born, with Spanish roots. I love showing people my city, from the Elbe to the late-night cafe around the corner. Easygoing, warm, and always curious about new people.

providers.name: Marlene
providers.about: An art historian by profession, a companion by choice. I feel just as at home at a gala evening as on a weekend in Vienna. If you value style and someone genuinely present, you're in the right place.

providers.name: Johanna
providers.tagline: Rhineland warmth, never in a hurry.
providers.about: I take my time. For a long breakfast, a walk along the Rhine, or just a conversation that makes you forget the evening is passing. Humour matters more to me than the perfect plan.

providers.name: Katharina
providers.tagline: Business dinners or a weekend by the lake.
providers.about: At home among the banks and the skyline. I'll join you confidently for business dinners and receptions, and I know when talking helps and when silence does. On weekends, I happily trade heels for hiking boots.

providers.name: Nadia
providers.tagline: Art, fashion, and a good meal.
providers.about: Raised between Düsseldorf and Lyon. I love the art academy, small boutiques, and restaurants you only find out about if someone shows you. That's exactly what I like doing for you.

providers.name: Clara
providers.about: A Swabian with a soft spot for old records and new wines. I like people who listen and places where you lose track of time. An afternoon in the vineyards is my idea of luxury.

providers.name: Vivienne
providers.about: A pianist, a night owl, a good listener. I'll join you at the concert hall, a premiere, or an extended trip. Elegant when the occasion calls for it, relaxed the moment the door closes.

providers.name: Greta
providers.tagline: Galleries in old factories, coffee everywhere.
providers.about: Leipzig is the most beautiful place in the world right now, and I'll show you why. Studios, courtyard concerts, breakfast that runs into the afternoon. I'm easygoing and genuinely curious.

providers.name: Elif
providers.tagline: Theatre, harbour, and a long dinner.
providers.about: A dramaturg at the theatre, so I'm often out in the evenings and know the best places to go afterward. I like conversations with depth and people who take their time. Nothing rushed, everything genuine.

providers.name: Mira
providers.tagline: The Isar in summer, the cinema in winter.
providers.about: A photography student, always with a camera close by. I love the English Garden, small cinemas, and people who ask questions. It's easy to get talking with me.

providers.name: Annika
providers.tagline: Carnival or concert, always with poise.
providers.about: I like being where things are happening, but I also know how to appreciate a quiet evening. Whether it's a reception, a trip, or just a good meal, what matters to me is that it feels real, not performed.
